file_insights.purpose: Comprehensive TUI specification for bop ui — full interactive terminal interface with ratatui, crossterm, nucleo
key_sections: AppEvent enum pattern (Key, Resize, Tick, Cards, LogLine)

key_changes.change: Reordered Meta struct fields: moved exit_code and paused_at before validation_summary

key_changes.reason: Performance: rfind is more idiomatic for finding last matching line, avoids unnecessary filter iterator allocation

key_changes.change: Reformatted long anyhow::bail! and path construction chains for readability
Updated 4 test Meta struct initializations to match new field ordering (exit_code, paused_at)

file_insights.inference: Related changes to match spec 029, likely minor updates
Integration updates for spec 029 TUI, likely dispatch logic changes

patterns_discovered.evidence: exit_code and paused_at moved in Meta initialization across seed_default_templates and 4 test cases
patterns_discovered.impact: Compilation requires synchronized updates across all struct instantiation sites

patterns_discovered.evidence: Replaced lines().filter().last() with .rfind() for log tail reading
Long method chains and bail! statements wrapped for consistency (80-100 char lines)
patterns_discovered.impact: Improved readability and git diff clarity

patterns_discovered.evidence: spec 029 includes dependencies, layout ASCII diagrams, acceptance criteria, startup behavior
patterns_discovered.impact: Clear implementation roadmap referencing prior art (ratatui, codex-rs, k9s, lazygit, htop, btop)

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Field reordering silent breakage in tests
gotchas_discovered.details: When Meta struct field order changes, test initialization must match or compilation fails. Four test cases (lines 2239, 2456, 2533, 2604) all needed exit_code/paused_at repositioning.
gotchas_discovered.risk: High: affects test suite validity without obvious error location
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Use struct update syntax (..Default::default()) or derive procedural macros to reduce manual field listing

gotchas_discovered.details: Original pattern lines().filter().last() creates intermediate iterator; rfind() is more direct. This matters in hot paths during live log tail updates.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Lint for filter().last() patterns and suggest rfind() replacement

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Spec complexity: TUI requires coordinated async task spawning
gotchas_discovered.details: spec 029 requires tokio::select!, notify watcher, timer ticks, log tail reader, all feeding AppEvent enum. Crossterm raw mode and alternate screen cleanup must be RAII-guarded against panics.
gotchas_discovered.risk: High: easy to leave terminal in broken state on panic or early exit
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Implement Drop guard pattern immediately, add integration tests for panic cleanup

gotchas_discovered.details: spec 029 forbids rendering partial lines (flicker mid-ANSI sequence). Requires buffering until \n and seeking to EOF on card selection. Off-by-one errors in VecDeque rotation are possible.
gotchas_discovered.risk: Medium: visual glitches hard to reproduce
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Snapshot tests for log tail rendering with ANSI sequences

approach_outcome.description: Run make check to verify all tests pass
artifacts_delivered: Spec 029 full TUI design (230 lines, dependencies, layout, acceptance criteria)
Fixed field reordering in Meta struct (4 test cases + seed template)
approach_outcome.test_result: make check passed — all tests + clippy + fmt successful
approach_outcome.confidence: High: reproducible, synchronized across cards.rs tests and dispatcher integration

recommendations.recommendation: Implement spec 029 TUI as next spec (Wave 6 dependency)
recommendations.rationale: Spec is comprehensive with clear dependencies (ratatui 0.29, crossterm 0.28, nucleo 0.5 all MIT), prior art synthesis, and acceptance criteria. Start with AppEvent enum and basic alternate screen entry.

recommendations.recommendation: Add RAII panic guard tests for crossterm raw mode + alternate screen cleanup
recommendations.rationale: spec 029 requires Drop guard to restore terminal on panic. Missing this causes broken terminal state. Add test that panics mid-render and verifies cleanup.

recommendations.recommendation: Enforce struct field ordering via clippy or proc-macro in Meta initialization
recommendations.rationale: Four test failures due to reordering suggest manual field ordering is error-prone. Use struct update syntax or derive attributes to reduce surface area.

recommendations.recommendation: Audit hot-path iterators in cards.rs for filter().last() anti-pattern
recommendations.rationale: Log tail reading optimized from filter().last() to rfind(). Likely other similar patterns exist in card state transitions or filtering loops.

recommendations.recommendation: Use insta for all TUI widget renders (CardList, Detail, Header, LogTail)
recommendations.rationale: spec 029 calls for snapshot tests. Set up insta crate integration before implementing widgets to catch rendering regressions early.

recommendations.recommendation: Coordinate dispatch.nu changes with spec 029 TUI entry point
recommendations.rationale: dispatch.nu modified in commit; likely needs integration with bop ui subcommand invocation. Test Zellij pane detection ($ZELLIJ env var) before next wave.

recommendations.recommendation: Update CONTRIBUTING.md with AppEvent pattern example
recommendations.rationale: spec 029 uses codex-rs AppEvent pattern. New contributors will benefit from a minimal example in docs.
